description_long: This object depicts a stylized human figure seated in a wheelchair, constructed from simple geometric shapes. The figure has a round brown head with a lighter face, a cylindrical blue torso, and blue cylindrical legs with brown feet. The wheelchair features a large blue cylindrical seat, a gray rectangular backrest, and two large gray wheels at the rear with two smaller oval wheels at the front. The arms of the figure are bent at the elbows, with hands resting near the lap, and the feet are supported by small brown footrests. The overall design is minimalistic, with clear separation between the person and the wheelchair components, and the object is shown both assembled and exploded to reveal individual parts.
description: A stylized person with a brown head and blue body is seated in a gray and blue wheelchair with large rear wheels and small front casters. The figure's arms are bent and feet rest on small footrests.
description_view_0: Front and exploded view showing the person seated in the wheelchair, with all parts clearly visible and separated for detail.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profile of the wheelchair and the person, highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear and exploded view showing the back of the wheelchair, the large rear wheels, and the back of the figure's head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the wheelchair and the person, with the arm and wheel arrangement visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two large rear wheels and two small front casters
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with arms bent at the elbows and hands resting near the lap, legs forward with feet on footrests.
